kernel.assumed_quotient: assuming the global quotient violates the emission contract
kernel.kernel_killing_scalar: an extra integral-charge singlet collapses the kernel to the pure full-turn deck translations; a trivial residual cannot satisfy the packet

opposite_weyl.failure: every declared one-scalar Yukawa channel then has charge sum away from zero, so the Gauss sector is empty
opposite_weyl.same_reduct: the odd-parity selection realizes the conjugate module

selection.even_including_vacuum: the full even Clifford module keeps the trivial vacuum line inside matter
selection.lambda2_only: ten states with three weak doublets: odd Witten parity

typing.bosonic_matter: the derived matter-building operators anticommute; bosonic typing fails closed
typing.charge_dead: a charge-dead contract annihilates the central lane, so the current action is unfaithful
typing.representation_arithmetic: representation arithmetic without the operator projector is not physical realization
typing.uniqueness_promotion: promoting MAR uniqueness inside this packet is rejected; only nonemptiness is discharged

vec_and_svec.conclusion: the Vec and sVec same-reduct typings fail against derived facts, not by fiat
vec_and_svec.svec_split: a split lift would give the 120-element group more than one involution; the derived group has exactly one
vec_and_svec.vec: an ungraded category cannot carry the derived nontrivial parity and non-split spin cocycle
